paper.title_en: On correlated noise in the LIGO-Virgo network: a test of the stochastic gravitational-wave background hypothesis
paper.abstract_en: We revisit the inter-detector cross-correlation criterion used in gravitational-wave validation by extending the analysis of Creswell et al.~\cite{Creswell2017} to nine LIGO--Virgo candidate events from the O2 and O3 observing runs. For each event, we analyze all three detector pairs (H1$\times$L1, H1$\times$V1, L1$\times$V1) and compare the normalized cross-correlation function $C(τ)$ in the event window with an empirical ensemble of $N=200$ surrounding off-source windows, using a band-pass-only pipeline. In 26 of 27 pair-measurements, the event peak is statistically indistinguishable from the corresponding noise ensemble, including all pairs involving the independent Virgo detector. The only exception is GW190412 in the H1$\times$L1 pair. We conclude that the cross-correlation statistic does not provide a robust standalone separation between event and noise. We interpret the persistence of comparable correlation structure in the LIGO--Virgo pairs as evidence that the strain data may contain a continuous correlated physical component, for which a stochastic gravitational-wave background is a plausible candidate.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文研究LIGO-Virgo探测器之间的相关噪声，对随机引力波背景假设进行检验，方法与脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）密切相关，结论有启发性。
decision.title_zh: 论LIGO-Virgo网络中的相关噪声：对随机引力波背景假设的检验
decision.abstract_zh: 我们重新审视了引力波验证中使用的探测器间互相关准则，将Creswell等人\cite{Creswell2017}的分析扩展到来自O2和O3观测运行的九个LIGO-Virgo候选事件。对于每个事件，我们分析了所有三个探测器对（H1×L1，H1×V1，L1×V1），并使用仅带通滤波的流水线，将事件窗口中的归一化互相关函数$C(τ)$与由$N=200$个周围非源窗口组成的经验系综进行比较。在27次对测量中，有26次的事件峰值在统计上与相应的噪声系综无法区分，包括所有涉及独立Virgo探测器的对。唯一的例外是H1×L1对中的GW190412。我们得出结论，互相关统计量不能提供稳健的独立事件与噪声区分。我们将在LIGO-Virgo对中持续存在的可比相关结构解释为证据，表明应变数据可能包含一个连续的相关物理成分，而随机引力波背景是一个合理的候选者。
